id: String (e.g., 'MHLG_236') - Unique identifier for the mapping
title: String - Evocative title for the specific game
layer: String - Linguistic layer or cultural system (e.g., 'Yoruba', 'Sanskrit')
legacy_spanish_word: String - The original Spanish concept being re-coded (e.g., 'Inteligencia')
new_kernel_concept: String - The new concept replacing the legacy one (e.g., 'Ogbon')
mechanic: String - The logic, rule, or metaphor of the new concept
quest_objective: String - Specific goal for the user to achieve in consciousness
ollama_system_prompt: String - Complete AI instructions for character embodiment and phase monitoring
